titleStmt.title: SII 34.71: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 71. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: On king's order the dēvadāna land that was held as cultivation lease (uḻavaḍai) by a Kurugāḍi-Kiḻaiyān Kūttan who married the sister of Kiḷinallūr-kiḻavan Āḍavallāṉ, was sold in royal auction (Rājarāja-peruvilai) and the sale amount was deposited in the government treasury. It is said that the sale was made according to a royal order which said that since Kiḷinallūr-kiḻavaṉ had become a traitor all his and his relatives' properties including their kāṇi and slaves should be sold off in public auction under the supervision of the officials Jinattaraiyaṉ and the puravuvari-sīkaraṇanāyagam Paḻaiyanūr-uḍaiyāṉ. The land sold in the present instance was in Vaṇṇam alias Madurāntaka-nallūr, a tirunāmattukkāṇi village of the temple of Kārkōṭīśvaram in Viṟai-kūṟṟam of Vikramachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. [For a corollary of this record see 67 above].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī rājarājatEvaṟku yāṇṭu 10 7 vatu ḷ 3 10 7l vikkarama cOḻavaḷanāṭṭu viṟaik kūṟṟattu kāmatavalliccaruppEti maṅkalattu tirukkāṟkOṭiśvavara muṭaiyār kOyil ĀticaṇṭEśvara tEvar tirunāmattāl rājarājapperuvilai viṟṟukkuṭutta paricāvatu 10 7 vatu nāḷ 2 10 8 l Iṭṭa niṉaippiṉpaṭi turOkittu daṇṭi
ppuṇṭa kiḷinallūr kiḻavaṉ Āṭavallāṉ kāṇiyumaṭimaiyum Ivanaṭutta Uṟavu muṟaiyār kāṇiyumaṭimaiyum jinattaraiyaṉum puravaricikaraṇa nāyakam paḻaiyanūruṭaiyānum vilaimatittapaṭi kācōṭukkik koḷvāṟkku rājarājāpperuvilai viṟṟu Ivarkaḷeḻuttiṭṭa pramāṇam koṇṭāṟkku sommākat tiruviḷiṉamā
namaiyil kiḷinallūr kiḻavan Āṭavallāṉ Uṭaṉ piṟantāḷaikkoṇṭa kurukāṭi kiḻaiyāṉ kkūttanukku vikkaramacōḻa vaḷanāṭṭu viṟaikkūṟṟattu Ittēvar tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa vaṇṇamāṉa maturāntaka nallūr nilam 5 10 2 liyil Ivaṉuḻavaṭaiyāṉa nilattukku Ivvūril Uḻavaṭai Uṭaiya Uttama
cōḻa mūvēntavēḷāneḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvarippaṭi Ikkurukāṭikiḻaiyāṉ Uḻavaṭai nila 3 10 1 kku Uḻavaṭai prāptikku vilai matitta kācu 7 100 5 10 Ik kāceḻunūṟṟaimpatukku rājarājap peruvilaiyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttamaikku Ivai puravarici karaṇanāyakam paḻaiyaṉūruṭaiyāneḻuttu
Ivai ciṉattaraiyaneḻuttu ....
Digital edition of SII 34.71 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
